title: Sol Sol Lyrics Thalaivaa Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Sol Sol
Singer: Vijay Prakash, Abhay Jodhpurkar, Megha
Movie: Thalaivaa
Music: GV Prakash
Lyrics: Na Muthukumar		 Other Song Lyrics:

Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words

Sol sol sol anbae nee sol
nil nil nil pogadhey nil
sol sol sol sollaamal sol
solvadhellaam kannale sol

Oru nenjil modhiyadhum
kadhal saaral ennai thaakka
andhi maalai sooriyanum
merkil vandhu nindru
unnai ennai ondru serkka

Ennaennavo thondrudhey en peney
un nerukkam vendudhey
kanney kanney    ..(Sol sol sol)

Oru nenjil modhiyadhum
kadhal saaral ennai thaakka
andhi maalai sooriyanum
merkil vandhu nindru
unnai ennai ondru serkka

Kanavugal ketkudhu nee vara
kai viral ketkudhu nee thoda

yaro ennai paarkum oru
ennam thondirda
neeye endru paarpen
adhai engae sollida

en neram indru avasaramaai
maariponadhey
En seigai indru ragasiyamaai
ennai aaludhey

Imaigalil pani thuli vizhuvadhum
vayil vandhum adhu mela ezhuvadhum
iyarkayil nadakira ragasiyam
anbae anbae..  ..(Sol sol sol)

Oru nenjil modhiyadhum
kadhal saaral ennai thaakka
andhi maalai sooriyanum
merkil vandhu nindru
unnai ennai ondru serkka

Iruvarum oru mozhi pesalaam
idayunil mounathil pesalaam
penneae nejam ennum kootai thirakka
kannae un kangal adhu saavi koduka

en perinil endhan perinai serkka
aasai vandhadhey
un thozhil endhan thozh vandhu saaya
neram vandhadhey

idhu idhu idhu oru inbamaa
idhu idhu idhu oru thunbamaa
inbamum thunbamum serndhadhaa
solvaai pennae ..(Sol sol sol)
Sol sol sol anbae nee sol ...

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Sol Sol'?

The song 'Sol Sol' expresses the joy and excitement of love, capturing the essence of romantic feelings through its lyrics.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Thalaivaa'?

In Thalaivaa, 'Sol Sol' is a pivotal moment that showcases the blossoming romance between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of the film.

Who are the singers and music director of 'Sol Sol'?

'Sol Sol' features the talented voices of Abhay Jodhpurkar, Megha, and Vijay Prakash, with music composed by GV PrakashKumar.

When was 'Sol Sol' released?

'Sol Sol' was released on June 19, 2013, as part of the Thalaivaa soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: 'Sol Sol' is a delightful romantic number from the movie Thalaivaa, showcasing the exuberance of love through its lively beats and heartfelt lyrics. The song captures the essence of youthful romance, making it perfect for celebrations and joyous occasions. With a blend of melodious voices and vibrant music, it evokes feelings of happiness and excitement. This track stands out as a memorable highlight in the film, resonating with audiences who cherish love and togetherness.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sol Sol from Thalaivaa is a vibrant celebration of love, featuring a unique collaboration between the melodious voices of Abhay Jodhpurkar, Megha, and Vijay Prakash. With GV PrakashKumar's captivating music and Na Muthukumar's heartfelt lyrics, this song perfectly encapsulates the joyous spirit of romance. Dive into the enchanting world of Sol Sol and let its infectious energy sweep you off your feet!
stanzaMeanings: Speak, speak, my love, don't go away, just speak without saying anything.
In one heart, love is like a drizzle, pulling me in; the evening sun comes and stands to unite us.
I don't know what's happening, my girl, I need your closeness, my dear, my dear... (Speak, speak, speak)
In one heart, love is like a drizzle, pulling me in; the evening sun comes and stands to unite us.
You hear dreams, you come with your hands, you touch.
Whoever sees me, I will say that you are the one; where should I say that?
My time today has changed suddenly; my actions today have become a secret, they are affecting me.
In the rain, droplets fall, and when they come to the ground, they rise again; this is the secret of nature, my love, my love... (Speak, speak, speak)
In one heart, love is like a drizzle, pulling me in; the evening sun comes and stands to unite us.
Both can speak in one language, or we can be silent in between; my dear, the truth will open up, your eyes will give life.
In my name, my desire to connect has come; your work has come to my side at the right time.
This, this, this is a joy; this, this, this is a sorrow; do you say that joy and sorrow are mixed, my dear... (Speak, speak, speak)
In one heart, love is like a drizzle, pulling me in; the evening sun comes and stands to unite us.
Speak, speak, my love, don't go away, just speak...
